title: River Monsters
subTitle: Extreme fishing series. Jeremy investigates three mysterious deaths in three South American countries on his most remote mission to date.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Wade comes face-to-face with one of South America's greatest freshwater fighting fish.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Daring biologist and extreme fisherman Jeremy Wade travels to Guyana in South America in search of a terrifying river monster believed to be responsible for the mysterious disappearance of several people.

title: China's Wild Secrets
subTitle: Spanning five of China's hidden wildlife havens, exploring some of the world's most diverse ecosystems. From lush rainforests to soaring mountains, we uncover never-before-seen animal behaviours.

title: China's Wild Secrets
subTitle: Spanning five of China's hidden wildlife havens, exploring some of the world's most diverse ecosystems. From lush rainforests to soaring mountains, we uncover never-before-seen animal behaviours.

title: San Diego: America's Wildest City
subTitle: Experiencing the hidden wonders of San Diego, where humans and wildlife coexist in the country's most biodiverse urban landscape.

title: Africa's Hunters
subTitle: Kamuti is a wise old leopard who has reigned over two square miles of prime territory in the Luangwa Valley for ten years, but now she is in trouble. At 13-years-old, Kamuti is one of the oldest leopards in the African bush, and she is not as effective a hunter as she used to be. Kamuti's problems are compounded by her neighbours, the Nsefu pride of lions, who steal her kills and attack her on sight.

title: Aussie Snake Wranglers
subTitle: On the Sunshine Coast, Stuart and Olivia are called to one of the largest red- bellied black snakes they have ever seen. Jess proves that diamonds really are a girl's best friend when she wranglers her first ever diamond python.

title: Elephants Up Close
subTitle: African elephants have an extraordinary ability to find waterholes and communicate with each other.

title: San Diego: America's Wildest City
subTitle: Experiencing the hidden wonders of San Diego, where humans and wildlife coexist in the country's most biodiverse urban landscape.

title: Animal Planet HD English
subTitle: The life story of a charismatic hippo in Zambia's Luangwa Valley. Over 35 years, he grows from a small calf to a full-fledged leader. His experiences make him stronger and stronger, until he is ready for kingship.

title: America's Wild Seasons
subTitle: Across the continent, the land and its wildlife breathe in warmth and renewal. For some animals, courtship rituals begin to heat up as battles for dominance break out. For others, it's the time to tend to brand new life.

title: America's Wild Seasons
subTitle: Summer is the time of plenty across America. It's a chance for animals to reap nature's bounty while they can. The year's young begin to explore their world, while new parents make use of the long days to make sure they grow up strong.

title: America's Wild Seasons
subTitle: Winter is the ultimate challenge. As temperatures plunge across much of America, some animals escape to milder climes of the South, while others stay put and tough out the brutal cold and blizzards that blanket the North.

title: Big Cat Tales
subTitle: Jonathan discovers the secretive den site of Dada the lioness' newborn cubs. Meanwhile, Olare, the leopard, displays a rarely seen mating ritual.

title: Defending the Family
subTitle: In the animal kingdom, defending young takes priority above all else, and every creature deploys its own unique strategies to keep their family safe.

title: One Wild Day
subTitle: A day in the life of desert animals fighting to survive in some of the world's most extreme environments, revealing elephants setting out on an epic journey, a beetle that likes morning yoga, and a real-life night monster.

title: One Wild Day
subTitle: A day in the lives of animals living on the vast grassy plains of Africa, from majestic lion prides heading out on their morning hunt to a hot and bothered hippo.

title: One Wild Day
subTitle: A day in the life of jungle animals that have evolved to thrive in this diverse habitat, featuring daring sloths, cheeky monkeys, and lightning-fast lizards.

title: Creative Killers
subTitle: The filmmaker follows wildebeests and zebras circling East Africa looking for lush grazing and sheds light on the hungry river crocodiles who lie in wait for this movable feast.

title: Wild Sri Lanka
subTitle: The plains of Sri Lanka are dominated by its extraordinary climate, one that every living thing must adapt to, by changing, migrating or making unlikely alliances.

title: The Teeth Of The Savannah
subTitle: The Teeth Of The Savannah

title: Secret Creatures Of Thailand
subTitle: Secret Creatures Of Thailand

title: River Monsters
subTitle: On the tropical island of Sulawesi, Indonesia, a tourist snorkeler and several local fishermen have been killed and injured by a mysterious sea creature that impales its victims. Wade travels to the scene to investigate.

title: A Game Of Leopard Thrones
subTitle: Filmed over ten years, an in-depth look at the leopard characters of South Africa and their fascinating unfolding story once their Queen dies.

title: Wondrous & Wild
subTitle: Life around the planet, including births and deaths, joyous moments and dangerous situations.

title: Raptors
subTitle: Birds of prey, nature's ultimate hunters, conquer the globe with sharp talons, hooked beaks and a taste for flesh. We reveal their secrets, stunning behaviours and future in a fast-changing world, from wild lands to our backyards.

title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: In Central Namibia, a painted wolf pack roams the vast, drought-ravaged wilderness, led by their matriarch, Zeema.

subTitle: Experiencing the hidden wonders of San Diego, where humans and wildlife coexist in the country's most biodiverse urban landscape.

title: Aussie Snake Wranglers
subTitle: Stuart and Oliva visit an elderly couple's house where they find an eastern brown snakelet. Love is in the air when Chris and Stu are called in to remove a pair of coastal carpet pythons caught in an intimate moment.

subTitle: The filmmakers reveal the survival skills of the toughest animals, from foxes to fish and enormous mammals fighting for their breeding rights.

title: Nature's Ultimate Survivors
subTitle: The filmmakers explore remarkable aquatic life, showcasing birds and symbiotic relationships that diverse species have adapted to survive in challenging river and ocean environments.

title: Nature's Ultimate Survivors
subTitle: The crew take a look at animal cognition and the intelligence of various species, from primates' problem-solving abilities to birds' and predators' hunting prowess.

title: Cute to Killer
subTitle: Zimbabwe is the perfect habitat for Africa's finest predator. Follow the development of four cubs, from two weeks to three years old, as they progress from 'Cute to Killer'.

title: Wild Sri Lanka
subTitle: Many species unique to Sri Lanka live nowhere except its central highlands, but the cloud forests are threatened by the tea trade.

subTitle: The life story of a charismatic hippo in Zambia's Luangwa Valley. Over 35 years, he grows from a small calf to a full-fledged leader. His experiences make him stronger and stronger, until he is ready for kingship.

title: Fear on the Savannah
subTitle: Authorities introduced lions in a rehabilitated national park where only herbivores lived, and fear overtook the park.

title: Africa's Super Snake
subTitle: She has no hands, no arms, no legs, but she'll crush you to death in 15 minutes. She's an African Rock python and she's queen of the constrictors.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, terror grips a fishing community when something in the water leaves a trail of bloody victims in its wake. The only clues they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it left behind.

title: A Game Of Leopard Thrones
subTitle: Filmed over ten years, an in-depth look at the leopard characters of South Africa and their fascinating unfolding story once their Queen dies.

title: Kui Buri: Thailand's Hidden Eden
subTitle: Visit a jungle paradise that is a model for national parks around the world.

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Survivors and experts share tales of Australia's deadly beaches and dangerous waters.

title: In for the Kill
subTitle: Natural predators use camouflaged markings and hidden tunnels to pull off feats of speed, cunning and agility in their hunts.

title: Just Animals
subTitle: Explores the interesting facets, physical features, behaviours and habitats of a wide variety of animal species.

title: The Zoo
subTitle: Located just 10 miles from New York's Times Square, the Bronx Zoo is a recognised world leader in animal care and species conservation. It houses more than 6,000 animals and has a staff of 500-plus people dedicated to their care and well-being. Never before have camera crews been granted full access to the 265-acre campus, until production of the docuseries `The Zoo'. The results are stories focusing on dozens of animals and experiences at the facility, and its critical mission to conserve wildlife around the world. Episodes also highlight various employees and how their expertise and skills help provide top-quality care for the animals.

title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
subTitle: Carrying on late wildlife conservationist Steve Irwin's mission to bring people closer to animals is now the mission of his family. Terri, Bindi and Robert Irwin return to Animal Planet, giving viewers access to their wildlife adventures around the world and the amazing animals that continue to inspire their conservation efforts. The series features the family caring for more than 1,200 animals at the Australia Zoo; overseeing a world-class wildlife hospital, the largest of its kind in the world; and conducting high-level global expeditions.

title: Jewels of the Natural World
subTitle: Explores stunning natural landscapes and how animals act on their protective and fierce nature to survive and reproduce.

title: Into the Wild: India
subTitle: A journey into India's wilderness highlighting some of its most iconic creatures and diverse habitats. Ranging from tundra to extreme desert, rainforest to urban jungle which provide varied ecological and geographical areas for species to survive.

title: Wild By Nature
subTitle: WILD BY NATURE is a television series about wild nature, which deals with the endemic fauna of Mexico, narrated from a fresh, intrepid, and original point of view with a message of conservation and care for our species. Our protagonist, the actor and naturalist Arturo Islas travels through the going into their jungles, deserts, and seas in search of the wonderful species of fauna: mammals, birds, reptiles, amphibians, fish, and insects. WILD BY NATURE is a great experience of adventure and knowledge of natural wealth.

title: Caught in Motion
subTitle: An adventure in animal biomechanics to showcase the unseen moments of animals in action, from Budgerigars evading predators to kangaroos hopping and dolphins propelling themselves through water.
